form_name: O2C - Order Management - D2C Ecom - Forward & Reverse

questions.text: What is the function of an OMS (Order Management System) in L'Oréal's D2C e-commerce model?
options: A: Ithandles the creation of sales invoices in SAP
B: Itmanages large volumes of D2C orders efficiently
C: Itdetermines the appropriate pricing conditions for online sales

questions.text: Which D2C e-com model is not recommended by NEO?
What is a "Burger" in the context of L'Oréal's D2C e-commerce architecture?
options: D: A specific type ofproductbundleoffered online.

questions.text: The "Burger" architecture is mandatory for all L'Oréal entities, regardless of their D2C e-commerce revenue.
Which of the following is NOT a key feature of the D2C sales order process in SAP as described in the document?
options: A: Material determinationbased on EAN code conversionto SKU.
C: Manual pricing adjustmentsthatmaytrigger a workflow.
D: Visibilityof BOM (Bill of Materials) header and componentsforcertainordertypes.
